creator: jmohacsi@bsd.hu
text:
The net-mgmt/rancid is pointing to an old version of rancid which was superseded by rancid series 3. There is no point to keep rancid version 2 in the ports tree. Recommended actions:
- retire net-mgmt/rancid
- rename net-mgmt/rancid3 to net-mgmt/rancid and remove conflicts to old rancid
